name: Chilli Plum Beef
recipeIngredient: 750 g Beef eye fillet (in one piece)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim beef and slice thinly.
2. Combine beef, sauces, garlic, ginger, chilli, sugar, sherry, and cornflour in a large bowl. Mix well and cover. Marinate for 30 minutes or refrigerate overnight.
3. Heat a little oil in a wok. Add beef about a quarter at a time and stir-fry until browned. Remove from the wok as it is cooked; repeat with remaining beef.
4. Return beef to the wok with the remaining marinade, blended water, extra cornflour, and crumbled stock cube. Stir until the mixture boils and thickens.
